_notes: Configured June 2026. FSE runs the SearchSpring Snap theme (ul.ss__results dual-classed with productGrid, .ss__pagination, select-based sort control). Header is .site-header (not semantic <header>). PLP heading is h1.simple-heading. Sidebar uses aside.page-sidebar/.sidebarBlock (no #treeView). Subcategory boxes (.subCategoriesBox) use BESTUS-default .nameTitle / a.navList-action inner selectors. PDP description tab is #tab-description; product info form is #have_a_product_question (without _request suffix). No related carousel. No SS recently-viewed script. Footer is .site-footer: nav links are direct <a> children of .box (no ul/li), copyright is in .Copyright p (sibling of .footer-bottom, not inside it). Mobile breadcrumbs hidden (display:none) — mobileBreadcrumbsHidden:true. No pro-club, become-vendor, or architects form. KNOWN SITE DEFICIENCIES (tests intentionally failing — devs notified June 17 2026): (1) /new-home/ has no <meta name='description'> — SEO test 'has a non-empty meta description' fails; add meta description to the page in BigCommerce admin. (2) grid-box-icon-1.jpg in section[data-image-gallery] has no alt attribute — images.cy.js 'all product gallery images have a non-empty alt attribute' fails; add alt text to the image in BigCommerce Media Manager. July 2 2026: applying the sort DOES hash-route to #/sort:calculated_price:asc (verified live) — discovery.sort.urlHash filled (was null). July 21 2026: FSE taxonomy is NOT flat — nested subcategory pages render (e.g. /fire-extinguishers/dry-chemical/, /fire-extinguisher-cabinets/recessed/, semi-recessed, carbon-dioxide). plp.subcategory filled to /fire-extinguishers/dry-chemical/ — a child of plp.main (/fire-extinguishers/) so its breadcrumb trail carries the 'Fire Extinguishers' parent link the subcategory suite asserts (breadcrumbLabel); stale _absentFeatures flat-taxonomy entry removed. Subcategory suite verified green live (heading, 'Fire Extinguishers' breadcrumb link, grid products, sidebar) — 3 consecutive passes July 21 2026. LIGHTHOUSE SEO NOTE (updated July 22 2026): the homepage Lighthouse SEO score is 67, which CLEARS the current fleet-wide seo:65 floor, so the Lighthouse audit does NOT fail on SEO. Deficiency #1 (missing /new-home/ meta description) surfaces only via the seo.cy.js DOM assertion 'has a non-empty meta description', not Lighthouse. (Earlier notes referencing a 90/75 SEO floor were stale — the floor is 65.) LIGHTHOUSE (calibrated July 2 2026, live scores homepage a11y 82 / plp 75 / pdp 71): plp/pdp structurally below a healthy a11y score, but all clear the fleet-wide accessibility:60 floor (no per-store override). Homepage Lighthouse SEO scores 67, which clears the seo:65 floor (passes); the missing meta description (deficiency #1) fails only the seo.cy.js DOM assertion. KNOWN SITE DEFICIENCY #3 (devs notified July 21 2026; team chose to keep as-is July 22 2026, so the mobile touch-target tests are now SKIPPED via branding.skipTouchTarget:true — sanctioned team-decision exception): at mobile widths (verified live at 393px CSS via device emulation), the tallest interactive header element is the logo link a.header-logo__link at 42.98px — 1px below the 44px WCAG touch-target minimum — so homepage.mobile.cy.js 'interactive header elements meet minimum touch target height (44px)' fails on phones. The header logo image is HTML-commented-out in the theme markup, so the link box height comes purely from CSS. Fix: add min-height:44px (and display:flex/align-items:center) to a.header-logo__link in the FSE Snap theme; same touch-target class as the AAP deficiency, far milder (AAP hamburger was 23px). July 21 2026: dropped discovery.categories '/jl-industries/' — its 3rd product card is a quote-only item with no price element, which breaks the PLP-grade assertProductCards price check on discovery category pages (kept /potter-roemer/ and the 12 other cats, all verified live with priced+imaged first 3 cards).

_absentFeatures.verifiedAbsent: no Pro Club program on live site (June 2026 onboarding)
no become-a-vendor page on live site (June 2026 onboarding)
no /architects/ page on live site (June 2026 onboarding)
